name: Cook House
author: Poki
description: Cook up a storm in Cook House! Run your own panda restaurant and serve your customers the best food around. As you fill the orders, you can buy new items and cooking stations to use in your shop. These new items open up new recipes and menu's you can offer to your customers! Can you make your restaurant the best in town? How to play Cook House? Movement: Click on different spots to move Who created Cook House? Cook House was created by Lampogolovii. Play their other games on Poki: Day of Meat: Radiation , Gym Masters and Day of Meat ! How can I play Cook House for free? You can play Cook House for free on Poki. Can I play Cook House on mobile devices and desktop? Cook House can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
